plugins.name: stopgate
plugins.description: Stop hook that blocks lazy stops and returns actionable directives.

plugins.name: acl-lint
plugins.description: Pre-tool hook that validates acl.yaml structure on write/edit.

plugins.name: gateway-mcp
plugins.description: Cassandra Gateway — execute any platform tool via sandboxed Python.

plugins.description: Financial market data — stocks, SEC filings, macro, options, earnings.

plugins.description: Twitter/X — news search, Grok AI, post analytics, personal timeline.

plugins.description: Reddit — search, subreddit browsing, post + comment reading.

plugins.description: claude.ai — conversations, projects, knowledge docs, artifacts.

plugins.description: Discord — search messages, read channels/threads/DMs, attachments.

plugins.description: YouTube/media — transcription, YouTube search, comments, Watch Later.

plugins.description: Gemini — grounded web search and Q&A with stateful conversations.

plugins.name: perplexity-mcp
plugins.description: Perplexity — web search, grounded AI answers, step-by-step reasoning.

plugins.name: tradingview-mcp

plugins.name: routines-mcp

plugins.name: schwab-mcp
plugins.description: Charles Schwab — per-user brokerage data (quotes, accounts, positions, balances). Auto-prompts for re-auth at session start (owner-only ACL).

plugins.name: cass-image
plugins.description: Skill that teaches Claude to use `cass image` — a bash command that generates/edits images via your ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription. No MCP round-trip, auto-opens the result.
